name: Stir Fry of Broccoli & Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Skinned and Boned Chicken, cut into 1/4 inch thick breasts
6 cups Broccoli Florets (from about 2 large heads)
2 large Red or Green Peppers, quartered lengthwise and cut cross-wise into 1/8 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the breasts between sheets of waxed paper to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Wrap each chicken breast separately in plastic wrap and freeze until firm but not solid.
2. Cut the chicken cross-wise into 1/8 inch wide strips.
3. Cover broccoli with cold water in a medium bowl.
4. Coat a heavy skillet with vegetable spray. Add olive oil and heat over high heat for 1 minute.
5. Add red peppers (or green), onion, garlic, basil, thyme, pepper, and rosemary to the pan. Stir fry for 2 minutes.
6. Drain the broccoli, but do not shake off excess water; add it to the skillet. Stir fry for 3 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and steam until broccoli is tender, about 2 minutes.
8. Stir in the chicken breasts. Cover and steam until chicken is almost cooked through, about 1 minute.
9. Uncover and increase heat; stir fry until liquid reduces slightly, about 1 minute.
10. Divide among heated plates. Top each portion with 1 T. Parmesan cheese.
